# Alice Guardian Environment — fixture for tests
NODE_ENV=production

# Database
POSTGRES_PORT=5432
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=
POSTGRES_HOST=127.0.0.1

# Redis
REDIS_IMAGE=redis:7-alpine
REDIS_PORT=6379

# Backend
BACKEND_PORT=9090
BACKEND_IMAGE=jcaltamare/aliceguardian:backend

# WebSocket
WEBSOCKET_PORT=4550
WEBSOCKET_IMAGE=jcaltamare/aliceguardian:socket1

# Web
WEB_PORT=8080
WEB_IMAGE=jcaltamare/aliceguardian:web_ag

# RTSP/media
RTSP_PORT=8554
RTMP_PORT=1935
HLS_PORT=8888
HLS_PORT2=8889
HLS_PORT3=8890

# Milvus
MILVUS_PORT=19530
MINIO_API_PORT=9000
MINIO_CONSOLE_PORT=9001

# Workspace
WORKSPACE=alice

# Unmanaged — should pass through unchanged
SOME_CUSTOM_KEY=custom_value
ANOTHER_KEY=another_value
